title: Redesign DashboardPage calendar with stylish, elegant spiritual aesthetic

requirements.summary: Redesign the DashboardPage calendar with an elegant, spiritual aesthetic using the terracotta/cream theme, featuring styled month navigation, day labels, refined date cells with hover states, visual distinction for today and selected dates, indicators for dates with jap data, and smooth transitions while preserving all existing functionality
acceptanceCriteria: The calendar renders inside a visually elevated card with rounded corners and a soft shadow, using the terracotta/cream/dark-brown palette.
Month/year header is clearly displayed with styled prev/next navigation controls.
Day-of-week labels (Sun–Sat) are styled in the terracotta accent color.
Today's date is visually distinguished from other dates (e.g., terracotta ring or border).
The selected date cell has a solid terracotta background with cream-colored text.
Dates with jap data recorded display a small dot or accent indicator beneath the date number.
Hover and focus states on date cells are smooth and theme-consistent.
The calendar uses Cinzel or Lato fonts consistent with the rest of the app.
All existing date-click functionality (showing jap count for selected date) continues to work correctly.
The calendar is fully visible and non-overflowing on both mobile and desktop viewports.
Both light and dark theme modes apply appropriate background and text colors to the calendar.

file_operations.description: Redesign the calendar section with an elegant spiritual aesthetic: wrap the calendar in a card component with rounded corners (rounded-xl) and soft shadow (shadow-lg); style the month/year header with Cinzel font, larger text, and refined prev/next arrow buttons with hover states; apply terracotta color to day-of-week labels (Sun-Sat); add generous rounded corners (rounded-lg) to date cells with smooth hover and focus transitions; visually distinguish today's date with a terracotta ring (ring-2 ring-terracotta); style the selected date cell with a solid terracotta background (bg-terracotta) and cream text (text-cream); add small dot indicators beneath date numbers for dates with jap data stored in localStorage; ensure consistent use of Cinzel/Lato fonts; apply theme-aware backgrounds (light: cream/white, dark: dark-brown/muted) and text colors; preserve all existing date selection logic, jap count retrieval, and timezone-safe date key handling; ensure responsive layout that works on mobile and desktop without overflow
